title: man page omits possible locations for policy.json outside of /etc
body:
### Issue Description

`man 1 podman` for version 5.2.2 says:

```
CONFIGURATION FILES
       containers.conf (/usr/share/containers/containers.conf, /etc/containers/containers.conf, $HOME/.config/containers/containers.conf)

 <...>
       policy.json (/etc/containers/policy.json)

 <...>
```

However, user-local paths are now possible for `policy.json` as well post-#19231, so the documentation should reflect this.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

`man 1 podman`


### Describe the results you received

see above

### Describe the results you expected

see above
